title: SigTuple South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: SigTuple South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the SigTuple South Asia Partners family as a Full Stack Developer in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About SigTuple South Asia Partners:
SigTuple South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple South Asia Partners!
